Localization.Name: Gemini
Localization.Description: Personal weapon manufacturer. Generally makes kinetic weapons, but has recently acquired Octa, a small energy weapon start-up. Weapons are named sequentially.

English.Name: Gemini
English.Description: Personal weapon manufacturer. Generally makes kinetic weapons, but has recently acquired Octa, a small energy weapon start-up. Weapons are named sequentially.

Localization.Name: OT8-RF "HighSec" (8x Telescopic)
Localization.Description:
Manufacturer: Gemini
Type: Telescopic
Attachment Point: Optic
Magnification: 8x
Size: 3

Combining a premium 8x telescopic sight with Gemini's innovative echoburst rangefinder, the OT8-RF model allows you to accurately gauge the distance to your target; vital for effective precision shooting. The standard scope for Gemini's A03 Sniper Rifle, the OT8-RF is engineered to impress in a variety of situations and engagements.

The HighSec edition features a carbon fiber finish with red accents.
